reviewer.evidencePolicy: One-time replenishment of evidence-ref supportsClaimIds for two claims whose rename chains were compressed by past non-additive carry-forward rewrites. Each ref already passes the contentHash check against its bundle; replenishing the historical claim id lets the bundle createdForClaimIds intersect with the ref's supports under the new additive reconcile policy, so the claim restores to satisfied without authoring a new evidence bundle. Going forward, the additive rewrite preserves this chain automatically.

The bundle's deterministic proof of --output-text-key span extraction still covers the renamed claim wording.
